reviews.review_description:
Great game that nobody plays….Veterans play 2 against one if you’re a rookie trying to learn the game. Gee, I wonder why no new players!

Oh…only game (I own over 50 games) that BOOTS you off during a match…yeah that makes me want to come back…NOT!
I love Mech games since Mech Warrior 2 like 30 years ago. They somehow nailed the mech look and feel in VR and goofed the weapons and combat. It’s crazy how good is and how terrible the other is.

Got this on sale for $8 but decided to refund it.

Way too generic level design. 

Campaign was just an arena bot match with voice overs.

I have too many better mech games in VR already . This is the worst so didn’t see a reason to keep it.

Multiplayer madness. 
PvP mech warriors play 3-6pm Pacific time. 
Excellent community full of good people willing to help you become an Ace pilot. Just like them.
Most players hop on at 6:00 p.m.
Yeah don’t play this, it’s literally a phone game both in quality and content. Don’t waste your money or time on this.

Updated Review:

With no updates in over a year, and barely any changes since launch. This game will not keep you busy for long. 

The single player campaign will take about an hour or two before you get bored. Multiplayer is just dead.

It is sad because this game had so much potential. If they just added co-op campaign, or a single/co-op rogue lite game mode, more mechs/guns, etc. This game could have been great. 

But sadly the devs have never spent the time to build on this game... 2 Stars unless things change in the future.


Previous Review:

If you want a realistic mech shooter, you are better off on one of the other mech games, but if you want a more arcade-like mech shooter then this is the one to get. 

Also, I can sit in my bed and play this one (which is alot more difficult to do in the other mech vr titles)

This game is just pure fun when you just want to feel like you are in a mech and shoot some stuff. No crazy long dialogue and npcs to deal with in campaigns. It is just pure shoot and kill fun.

If you get motion sickness on the other ones, you probably won’t here (based on my wife and friends who do get motion sick very easily).

This game is also more fun than the other mech games (subjective) according to my friends and family who don’t like mechs in general.

p.s. this game needs a co op campaign badly, or some updates that add new mechs, maps etc.

Problems with multiplayer 
app crashes

without wifi, single player ok
Dead game lucky to run into one other real person

Gonna give that guy a love tap with the rail gun.

Brrapp brrapp brrapp

Hey! Where’d he go?!?
Best game out there

I love this game. Its gameplay is a good mix of “Zone of Enders “ and “Armored Core” 🤩 .If we had more guns and mods I would be willing to pay up to $20 for dlc or a battle pass. The game is just that good. 
P.s I don’t feel like a noobie anymore 🥳. I wish they would also add some kill streaks. I can get 25 kills in multiplayer without dying 🤣

reviews.review_title: excellent game. team work will win
reviews.review_description: great game. awesome players lots to learn.  really helps to have radio coms going on team matches.  bot games are boring to me but against a good human player it's awesome.  lots to learn. lots of mech classes.  I could possibly give it 5 stars if it had more players online all the time.  terrific game play

I've been waiting about a month for this game to come out. My expectations have been met. However I'm giving this review for a couple of reasons. I'd like to see,just suggesting and if possible, swappable weapons. One more thing that I would like to see, (this is a suggestion) would be an option to aim each cannon with your contollers. Although these probably won't be added, I'm not complaining considering how nice the gameplay feels and how fun it is.

reviews.review_title: Pretty good but feels like it's missing
reviews.review_description:
Pretty good but feels like it's missing something. I enjoy what I played so far. It would be cool to have a 1on1 mode. It plays nice for how short it has been out. Pretty polished and I like how you can upgrade. Curious to see how it grows! 

I also like how you can play sitting as I am currently learning how to walk again after an injury

developer_response.body:

In regards to additional modes - please take a look at our roadmap as we continue to provide content for our pilots. https://www.369.fun/press-worldofmechs - If you would like to further discuss and/or pitch ideas feel free to join our discord at discord.gg/worldofmechs

reviews.review_description: This game is incredible in many ways which I will explain right now, the mechanics are spot on and the buttons are so easy to understand once you get the hang of it. Gameplay is perfect and the visuals are astonishing. One of the best if not THE best mech game out there in vr!

developer_response.body:
Hi Ado1fO_VR,
Thanks for playing World of Mechs and loving it as much as we do! We appreciate your feedback. We would love if you became apart of our Community Discord at: https://discord.gg/worldofmechs

reviews.review_description:
Tldr: A comfortable, easy to pick up mech game. Loads of fun. Safe for families and kids, developped by a great group of guys that understand what Mechs should be. It's got a lot of room to grow, but it's easily one of the best 20 bucks I've spent on oculus. 

Longer version:
If you're looking for the kind of game you can play from your bed after a long day at work and still get some of that competitive fun but without all the sweating, this game is definitely for you. It's a mech game, but it's super accessible. Not too many layers to understand yet. Don't get me wrong, I love really in depth mech games, I've been playing them since Mechwarrior 2 was new, but it's fun to just hop in and not have to learn tons to be competitive.The game is new, so I expect it will evolve a little over time (which is a selling point for me, I love watching games grow) but the devs have specifically stated their aiming to keep it easy to pick up and play.

In terms of the mech combat. The devs really get what it should feel like. There is torso twisting, strafing, beefy footsteps, thumpy booms in the distance. The only complaint I have in terms of the feel at the moment is that the weapons could be chunkier, sound wise. But, hey, the game came out a week ago as of writing this, in sure that'll change too. And personally, I'd love to see a bit more customization, but that's being considered and worked on. 

The community is awesome.  Everyone works together. As such this game is absolutely family friendly. I haven't heard a racial slur or even any real smack talk, just good old fashioned teamwork. People coordinating movements, sharing armor, etc etc.  If you've got a kid and want a safe game to play with them without worrying about their vocabulary changing, bonus points there. And if your a mech game fan with a kid, spread the culture! We're a dying breed in the world of twitch shooters and whatnot. Lol 

Last note, the devs are an absolutely class team. They play the game and talk to players to get direct feedback, and are super responsive in the discord. I hope they do some kind of cosmetic seasonal thing so I can support them more, actually, because they've got the right ideas and if they the room to implement things without worrying where their next meal is coming from, I know this game is going to just keep getting better.

developer_response.body:
Hi Onerimeuse,
Thank you for the positive and honest feedback! We strive to listen to our community's concerns and implementing the necessary changes to make World of Mechs better and better. Mechs are our passion and we will continue to improve and grow!

reviews.review_description: Very fun, feels absolutely great inside that mech cockpit. Definitely not a mech simulator, more of a fast twitch shooter with mechs. I kind of like the faster action in this game, it makes it super fun and accessible for anyone of all ages. The map design is also pretty great, although it could do with just a few more, but I expect they are coming soon enough. There's definitely a ton to unlock and keep you busy, tons of cool mechs, tons of cool weapons. All in all a fantastic game well wortha go.

developer_response.body:
Hi Aceshigh66,
Thank you for playing World of Mechs and providing your honest feedback. We have alot of things planned for our roadmap, including adding more maps! Check out our road map here: https://www.369.fun/press-worldofmechs . Also be sure to join our Discord and come chat with us: https://discord.gg/worldofmechs
